subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which We have sent down in truth unto him who hath acknowledged the testimony of God when He appeared through His irrevocable and wondrous Cause. Verily, the Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزلناه بالحق لمن اقر بشهاده الله اذ ظهر بامره المبرم البدیع ان لمطلع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @belief and denial, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
